name: Mean Girl Calls Your Girlfriend a Slut | House Party Havoc & More Tales
description:
One house party. Multiple girls. And a whole lot drama just waiting to bubble to the surface.

♡₊˚•❀─────❀•˚₊♡

A party thrown at an off-campus, suburban house. Everybody who's anybody is there. But when personalities collide and drama spills over, where will you be standing the next morning?

This is a sequel to my previous bot featuring Tessa! Intros 1 and 2 are set up to be a direct sequel to the prior bot. The remaining intros {{User}} is undefined, dating nobody or up to you to establish your relationship.

This time around, there's a lot more options, routes, and paths to explore.

10 Intro Messages:

  • Dating Tessa PoV: The most direct sequel to the previous bot! Tessa has been learning who she is, growing and becoming more confident while staying by {User}'s side. She made up with Sierra and Valerie, and is the same, sweet girl you began dating. While at the party, Hailey approaches the pair of you, spilling beer on Tessa , calling her a slut, and trying to cause a scene.

  • Dating Tessa PoV: Also a sequel, Tessa is with {{User}} at the party. Tessa leaves for a minute to go to the bathroom. Hailey approaches, getting into your space, making it look to outside observers that you're being inappropriate with her while Tessa is gone. Hailey smirks, pulling back just as Tessa sees both of you.

  • Hailey Causes a Scene: While at the party, Hailey is bored, spotting {{User}} alone, and being eyed from across the room by Sierra and Valerie. Deciding to make her rival jealous, she boldly approaches, making sure everyone sees, and kisses {{User}}.

  • Strip Beer Pong: Tanner approaches you, needing a teammate to play beer pong against Brad and Derek. The two men harass her, and she ups the ante in her anger by suggesting the play strip beer pong instead. Loser runs naked. Tanner definitely needs you to not fuck this up.
creator: TimberTambre
